name: Palladium Group
description: Palladium is dedicated to making the world a better place through collaborative models and systemic approaches. With a presence in over 90 countries, they implement international development programs that link social and financial results, aiming to drive lasting social and economic development.

name: Palladium Group of Companies GEIE
description: Palladium Group of Companies is a privately owned real estate entity that focuses on portfolio and development investments.

name: Palladium Technologies Inc
description: Palladium Technologies aims to be a leading provider of technology-based integrated solutions, focusing on innovation in yacht management systems. Their flagship product, SiMON, is highly regarded for its comprehensive monitoring and control features, making it a benchmark in the industry.

name: PALLION GROUP PTY LIMITED
description: Pallion has been a key player in the Australian precious metals industry since 1951, offering a wide range of products and services. It is now Australasia's largest independent precious metal services group, which includes notable entities like ABC Bullion and ABC Refinery.

name: PALLADIUM BOOTS
description: Palladium has a rich history as a trusted choice for explorers, starting as a manufacturer of airplane tires in the 1920s. Their iconic boots and innovative models, like the Pallabrousse Legacy, reflect a commitment to durability and heritage, making them a popular choice for those seeking both style and resilience.

name: Palladium by Primenumbers
description: Palladium is a powerful analytical tool designed to enhance your bidding success with features like Possible Bidders, Estimated Bid price, and Market Share analytics. It simplifies the bidding process, providing a personalized dashboard for performance tracking and insights into your bidding history.

name: Palladium Insurance
description: Palladium Insurance is an independent brokerage that offers a wide range of insurance products, including personal and corporate insurance. Their expertise spans various sectors, ensuring tailored solutions for clients' diverse needs.

name: Pandora
description: Pandora is a manufacturer of hand-finished jewellery, primarily using recycled silver and gold, and has a strong commitment to sustainability.

name: Palantir Technologies
description: Palantir is a software company that specializes in data integration, analysis, and visualization, offering advanced tools that support critical problem-solving across various sectors, including national security, healthcare, and finance. Notably, Palantir Foundry for Crypto provides cutting-edge technology specifically designed for leading crypto companies.

name: Palladium Recycling Pty Ltd
description: Palladium Recycling (PPMR) specializes in high purity precious metals, including palladium, with a minimum purity of 99.99%. The company actively purchases and processes used catalytic converters and other scrap materials to recover valuable metals like palladium and rhodium, making it a key player in the precious metals recycling industry.
